step_by_step_thinking:
Intensifying screens are typically used to increase image quality and reduce scatter radiation, thus increasing contrast. Therefore, intensifying screens would logically be used to improve the visibility and clarity of features in the resulting images during extraoral radiographs.
\boxed{B} Based on the information given about the function of intensifying screens in improving image quality and reducing scatter radiation, leading to increased contrast, we can conclude that intensifying screens are utilized to enhance the contrast in extraoral radiographs.
